_meta.description: Curated catalog of Apify actors for the external_service_agent. The LLM picks the best match for the user's query.
_meta.how_to_add: Add a new entry with a unique key, actor_id from Apify Store, and an input_template matching the actor's expected input schema.

linkedin_jobs.name: LinkedIn Jobs Scraper
linkedin_jobs.description: Scrapes LinkedIn job listings. Accepts a job search URL or keyword. Returns job title, company, location, description, applicant count, and more.
linkedin_jobs.use_when: User wants to scrape LinkedIn job postings, job search results, or job listings.
linkedin_jobs.input_notes: Pass LinkedIn job search URLs in 'urls' array. 'maxItems' controls how many jobs to fetch.

linkedin_profiles.name: LinkedIn Profile Scraper
linkedin_profiles.description: Scrapes public LinkedIn profile data including name, headline, experience, education, skills.
linkedin_profiles.use_when: User wants to scrape LinkedIn profile pages or people search results.
linkedin_profiles.input_notes: Pass LinkedIn profile URLs or people search URLs.

linkedin_company.name: LinkedIn Company Scraper
linkedin_company.description: Scrapes LinkedIn company pages including about, employees count, specialties, and recent posts.
linkedin_company.use_when: User wants to scrape LinkedIn company pages or company data.

google_maps.name: Google Maps Scraper
google_maps.description: Scrapes Google Maps business listings including name, address, rating, reviews, phone, website.
google_maps.use_when: User wants to scrape Google Maps, find local businesses, or get business reviews.
google_maps.input_notes: Pass search queries in 'searchStringsArray'. Use 'maxCrawledPlaces' for count.

google_search.name: Google Search Results Scraper
google_search.description: Scrapes Google search results for given queries. Returns titles, URLs, snippets.
google_search.use_when: User wants to scrape Google search results or SERP data.
google_search.input_notes: Pass the search query as a string in 'queries'.

instagram_posts.name: Instagram Scraper
instagram_posts.description: Scrapes Instagram profiles, posts, hashtags, and locations.
instagram_posts.use_when: User wants to scrape Instagram posts, profiles, or hashtag data.
instagram_posts.input_notes: Pass Instagram URLs (profile, post, hashtag, or location) in 'directUrls'.

twitter_scraper.name: Twitter/X Scraper
twitter_scraper.description: Scrapes tweets, user profiles, and search results from Twitter/X.
twitter_scraper.use_when: User wants to scrape Twitter/X posts, profiles, or search results.
twitter_scraper.input_notes: Pass search terms or usernames. Use 'maxTweets' for count limit.

website_content_crawler.name: Website Content Crawler
website_content_crawler.description: General-purpose website crawler that extracts clean text content from any website, following links to sub-pages.
website_content_crawler.use_when: User wants to deeply crawl any website that blocks normal scrapers, or needs JavaScript rendering in the cloud.
website_content_crawler.input_notes: Pass start URLs as objects with 'url' key. 'maxCrawlPages' limits depth.

amazon_product.name: Amazon Product Scraper
amazon_product.description: Scrapes Amazon product listings, prices, reviews, and details.
amazon_product.use_when: User wants to scrape Amazon products, prices, or reviews.
amazon_product.input_notes: Pass Amazon product or search URLs.
